
---
title: "Curriculum vitae"
author: Grant Bruer
date: last-modified
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
editor: visual
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
---

## Publications

See [my Google scholar page](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Mh8XQCwAAAAJ)

{{< publications ../data/publications.bib  >}}
